task: Local Permits & Licenses — city/county bible (sample metro)
disclaimer: Municipal permit and license intelligence from cited public sources — informational only; not legal, zoning, or tax advice. Confirm fees and applicability with the cited city/county authority.
policy: Public municipal .gov sources only; HTTP 403/404 PARKED without bypass; gaps explicit.

regulator.agency: NYC Department of Small Business Services (SBS)

cited_facts.text: NYC business formation and industry-specific license routing starts with SBS; many sectors require additional agency permits (Health, Consumer Affairs, SLA, etc.).

citation.source_name: NYC Department of Small Business Services (SBS)
citation.agency: NYC Department of Small Business Services (SBS)

cited_facts.text: NYC Department of Small Business Services (SBS) portal: Start a Business - SBS.

citation.source_name: NYC Department of Small Business Services (SBS)
citation.agency: NYC Department of Small Business Services (SBS)

cited_facts.text: Learn what it takes to: Create a business plan Register your business Finance your business Find and plan your space Prepare to open Hire a team Open and operate Have questions?

citation.source_name: NYC Department of Small Business Services (SBS)
citation.agency: NYC Department of Small Business Services (SBS)

cited_facts.text: Please call the NYC Small Business Services Hotline at 888-SBS-4NYC (888-727-4692).

citation.source_name: NYC Department of Small Business Services (SBS)
citation.agency: NYC Department of Small Business Services (SBS)

cited_facts.text: Get the help you need to start your business City Programs & Initiatives NYC Business Express Service Team (BEST) Interagency effort providing a sole point of contact to cut through red tape.

citation.source_name: NYC Department of Small Business Services (SBS)
citation.agency: NYC Department of Small Business Services (SBS)

gaps.label: Published fee schedule for business_license
gaps.note: Fee tables often PDF-only or behind ePermit login

cited_facts.text: Zoning applications and land-use reviews in NYC are handled by the Department of City Planning and borough offices; ZoLa map defines district uses.
NYC Department of City Planning (DCP) portal: Department of City Planning.

gaps.label: Published fee schedule for zoning_use
gaps.note: Fee tables often PDF-only or behind ePermit login

cited_facts.text: Sign permits in NYC are filed with the Department of Buildings; zoning resolution and DOT rules govern size, projection, and illumination.
NYC Department of Buildings — Signs portal: NYC Department of Buildings.
The new law also introduces a one-year grace period for SST card renewals and includes updates to course equivalency standards.
Landmarked buildings and buildings in historic districts are exempt.
The report findings highlight areas that could potentially reduce the need for some sidewalk sheds without negatively impacting public safety.

gaps.note: Fee tables often PDF-only or behind ePermit login

regulator.agency: NYC Department of Health and Mental Hygiene (DOHMH)

cited_facts.text: Food service and many health permits route through DOHMH; occupancy and fire safety involve DOB certificates of occupancy and FDNY inspection for assembly uses.

citation.source_name: NYC Department of Health and Mental Hygiene (DOHMH)
citation.agency: NYC Department of Health and Mental Hygiene (DOHMH)

cited_facts.text: NYC Department of Health and Mental Hygiene (DOHMH) portal: NYC Health.

citation.source_name: NYC Department of Health and Mental Hygiene (DOHMH)
citation.agency: NYC Department of Health and Mental Hygiene (DOHMH)

cited_facts.text: Learn about services that are available and get information to keep you healthy during your trip.

citation.source_name: NYC Department of Health and Mental Hygiene (DOHMH)
citation.agency: NYC Department of Health and Mental Hygiene (DOHMH)

cited_facts.text: Find Sexual Health Services Sexual health care is available for people of all gender identities, sexual orientations, and immigration statuses in New York City.

citation.source_name: NYC Department of Health and Mental Hygiene (DOHMH)
citation.agency: NYC Department of Health and Mental Hygiene (DOHMH)

cited_facts.text: Learn more about low- to no-cost sexual health care services near you.

citation.agency: NYC Department of Health and Mental Hygiene (DOHMH)

cited_facts.text: NYC home-based businesses must comply with zoning (primarily residential districts), business registration, and sector-specific agency rules.
NYC SBS — Business from Home portal: Start a Business - SBS.
Learn what it takes to: Create a business plan Register your business Finance your business Find and plan your space Prepare to open Hire a team Open and operate Have questions?
